category_sources: source_facts.description says implementation of the DNS protocols; current_curation.category_path lists networking.
display_name_sources: Official ISC page is titled BIND 9; source_facts.name is bind.
docs_sources: Official ISC BIND page identifies the Administrator Reference Manual on Read the Docs as the primary configuration reference and links current ARM documentation.
repo_sources: Official ISC source access page gives the BIND 9 clone URL https://gitlab.isc.org/isc-projects/bind9.git and links the public GitLab repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list DNS server/client tools such as named, dig, host, nslookup, and dnssec-*; official ISC page describes BIND 9 as DNS system/name server software.
